name: creator_page_scraper
title: Creator Page Scraper
description: Retrieve structured public creator profiles, social links, featured links, and visible products from Komi and Pillar pages.

seo.title: Komi and Pillar Creator Page Scraper API
seo.description: Retrieve structured public Komi and Pillar profiles, social accounts, creator links, and visible products for agents.
seo.intro: Creator Page Scraper follows the transport each creator platform actually exposes: Komi's public profile and module APIs, and Pillar's rendered public storefront. It normalizes identity, bio, social accounts, featured destinations, and visible commerce data without requiring creator credentials.

useCases.title: Creator enrichment
useCases.description: Turn a public Komi or Pillar URL into normalized identity, bio, avatar, location, and social account data.

useCases.title: Link intelligence
useCases.description: Collect the public destinations a creator is actively featuring across their profile page.

useCases.title: Storefront monitoring
useCases.description: Track visible product names, descriptions, imagery, prices, and currencies where the platform exposes them.

faqs.question: Does this require a Komi or Pillar login?
faqs.answer: No. It reads only publicly accessible profile and storefront data.

faqs.question: Why do the two platforms use different retrieval strategies?
faqs.answer: Komi exposes public JSON resources, while Pillar materializes its useful profile data in the rendered application.

faqs.question: Are hidden products returned?
faqs.answer: No. The tool limits its normalized output to content the public page or public platform resources expose.

url.description: Public Komi or Pillar creator page URL. Scheme is optional.
